data.name: Krolik

weaponImprint.name: Hare
weaponImprint.trait: For every 3 kills caused by active attacks, gains 1 instance of [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. Activates only once per turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Before attacking, if the user moved more than 6/6/6/5/4/3 tiles, increases this attack's damage by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

data.effects: She has a bit of a temper and shows little interest in matters unrelated to herself, but her sense of responsibility is beyond reproach. Even if she is assigned a mission she absolutely detests, such as "serving as Nemesis' exclusive translator", she will still give it her all.

skills.name: Instantaneous Slash
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 1 tile, dealing melee physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them.

skills.name: Embers
skills.description: When attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases damage dealt by 15%. At the end of the action, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the closest 2 enemy targets within 5 tiles for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: When attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases damage dealt by 15%. At the end of the action, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the closest 2 enemy targets within 7 tiles for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: When attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases damage dealt by 15% and critical damage by 20%. At the end of the action, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the closest 2 enemy targets within 7 tiles for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When attacking a target with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases critical damage by 20%.

skills.name: Crushing Revolution
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 1 tile and deal AoE melee physical damage equal to 120% of attack to it and all enemy targets within a 3x3 area around it. Gain 1 point of Confectance Index. If there are no other allied units within 3 tiles after attacking, gain 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 1 tile and deal AoE melee physical damage equal to 120% of attack to it and all enemy targets within a 3x3 area around it. Gain 1 point of Confectance Index. If the target is in Stability Break, ignore 30% of its defense. If there are no other allied units within 3 tiles after attacking, gain 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target is under the effects of Stability Break, ignore 30% of its defense.

skills.name: Quenching Slash
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 1 tile, apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to it for 2 turns, deal melee Burn damage equal to 150% of attack, and gain 2 points of Confectance Index. After the attack, return to the original position before the action.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 1 tile, apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to it for 2 turns, deal melee Burn damage equal to 160% of attack, and gain 2 points of Confectance Index. After the attack, return to the original position before the action.

skills.name: Slaughter Sequence
skills.description: Selects 1 direction and moves to the farthest tile within 7 tiles, dealing melee Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to the first enemy encountered. If the target is already inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], ignores their Cover damage reduction and gains 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 direction and moves to the farthest tile within 7 tiles, dealing melee Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to the first enemy encountered. If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], ignores their Cover damage reduction and gains 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If an enemy is killed, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 direction and moves to the farthest tile within 7 tiles, dealing melee Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to the first enemy encountered. If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], ignores their Cover damage reduction, increases critical rate by 100% for this attack, and gains 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef]. If the enemy is killed, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If this kills the target, gain 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases critical rate by 100%.

keys.effect: If under the effects of a Burn buff, gains immunity to [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] and [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], and increases damage dealt by 5%.
For every 1 tile moved before an attack, the critical rate and critical damage of the attack is increased by 5%, to a maximum increase of 15%.
Reduces the Confectance Index consumption of the active skill Slaughter Sequence by 1 point.
The active skill Crushing Revolution deals 30% increased damage when hitting a single target.
If there are no other allied units within 3 tiles of the user, increase damage dealt by 10%.
When the active skill Quenching Slash kills an enemy target, reduces the skill's cooldown by 2 turns.
At the start of the action, if there are enemy units with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] on the field, gains [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] I for 2 turns.
Before attacking, if this unit moved more than 3 tiles, increases the user's critical rate by 10%.

vertebrae.effect: If the target is under the effects of Stability Break, ignore 30% of its defense.

doll.name: Krolik
doll.effects: She has a bit of a temper and shows little interest in matters unrelated to herself, but her sense of responsibility is beyond reproach. Even if she is assigned a mission she absolutely detests, such as "serving as Nemesis' exclusive translator", she will still give it her all.

imagoforms.effect: damage dealt to enemy units with Burn debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt to enemy units within 3 tiles is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
Damage increased by 10%. Cannot be cleansed.

Dandegate note: This is a special Krolik only skill that procs with her key Blazing Fury. This is a phantom buff that won't show up, but does appear to work based on internal testing.
